languages.text: Архмилитант Иждриг Батошски тщетно пытался сохранить разрываемый внутренними схизмами 32-ой полк, но в итоге был вынужден лично отдать приказ о его расформировании.
Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski tried in vain to save the schism-wracked 32nd Merov Regiment, but was eventually forced to order its disbandment.
languages.original_text: Архмилитант Иждриг Батошски тщетно пытался сохранить разрываемый внутренними схизмами 32-ой полк, но в итоге был вынужден лично отдать приказ о его расформировании.

traits.locale_text: Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski tried in vain to save the schism-wracked 32nd Merov Regiment, but was eventually forced to order its disbandment.
Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski tried in vain to save the schism-wracked 32nd Merov Regiment, but was eventually forced to order its disbandment.
Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski tried in vain to save the schism-wracked 32nd Merov Regiment, but was eventually forced to order its disbandment.

languages.text: 大軍事家イズドリーグ・バトシュスキーは、分裂の傷を負った32番目のメロフ連隊を救おうとしましたが、結局は解散を命じるしかありませんでした。
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski tried in vain to save the schism-wracked 32nd Merov Regiment, but was eventually forced to order its disbandment.

traits.locale_text: 大軍事家イズドリーグ・バトシュスキーは、分裂の傷を負った32番目のメロフ連隊を救おうとしましたが、結局は解散を命じるしかありませんでした。

languages.text: 首席战士伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基试图挽救深陷分裂的梅罗夫第32团，但他的所有努力不过是徒劳。最终，他不得不下令将其解散。
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski tried in vain to save the schism-wracked 32nd Merov Regiment, but was eventually forced to order its disbandment.

traits.locale_text: 首席战士伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基试图挽救深陷分裂的梅罗夫第32团，但他的所有努力不过是徒劳。最终，他不得不下令将其解散。

languages.text: L'archimilitant Izdrig Batoshski fut contraint d'ordonner la dissolution du 32e régiment de Merov, malgré tous les efforts qu'il avait déployés pour le sauver du schisme qui finit par le déchirer.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski tried in vain to save the schism-wracked 32nd Merov Regiment, but was eventually forced to order its disbandment.

traits.locale_text: L'archimilitant Izdrig Batoshski fut contraint d'ordonner la dissolution du 32e régiment de Merov, malgré tous les efforts qu'il avait déployés pour le sauver du schisme qui finit par le déchirer.

languages.text: El Archimilitante Izdrig Batoshski intentó en vano salvar al 32.º regimiento de Merov del cisma, pero, finalmente, se vio forzado a ordenar su disolución.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski tried in vain to save the schism-wracked 32nd Merov Regiment, but was eventually forced to order its disbandment.

traits.locale_text: El Archimilitante Izdrig Batoshski intentó en vano salvar al 32.º regimiento de Merov del cisma, pero, finalmente, se vio forzado a ordenar su disolución.

languages.text: Başmilitan İzdrig Batoshski, bölünüp parçalanan 32. Merov Alayı'nı kurtarmak için boş yere çabaladı ve sonunda alayın dağıtılmasını emretmek zorunda kaldı.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski tried in vain to save the schism-wracked 32nd Merov Regiment, but was eventually forced to order its disbandment.

traits.locale_text: Başmilitan İzdrig Batoshski, bölünüp parçalanan 32. Merov Alayı'nı kurtarmak için boş yere çabaladı ve sonunda alayın dağıtılmasını emretmek zorunda kaldı.

languages.text: Erzmilitant Izdrig Batoshski versuchte vergeblich, das gespaltene 32. Merov-Regiment zu retten, musste aber schließlich seine Auflösung anordnen.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski tried in vain to save the schism-wracked 32nd Merov Regiment, but was eventually forced to order its disbandment.

traits.locale_text: Erzmilitant Izdrig Batoshski versuchte vergeblich, das gespaltene 32. Merov-Regiment zu retten, musste aber schließlich seine Auflösung anordnen.
